[[inst_lbui]]
==== LBUI

*Syntax:* lbui [SrcL, simm], ->{t, u, Rd}

*Description:* Load 8-bit signedvalue from [Rs+offset], result to Rd/t/u.

*Encoding:*

image::../generated/encodings/enc_lbui.svg[LBUI encoding,width=800]

*Uop-Class:* LDA/BASE_IMM

*Compression:* L32 (len=32)

*Uop-Class payload:* `{"addr_mode": "BASE_IMM", "agu_kind": "LDA", "note": "User confirmed all loads are AGU/LDA", "source": "group_rule", "uop_kind": "AGU"}`
